title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Bajaj Electricals

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Bajaj Electricals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!
